title: Obligation
description: Output of L1 EXTRACT / L2 LENS (owned by Person A1). Person A2's L3 FILTER consumes a list of these. Field names must not change without a heads-up to A1 and B per the work-split doc.

id.description: Stable obligation id, e.g. obl_0042 (mapped from the dataset's obligation_id)

doc_id.description: Source document id (mapped from doc_id in policy_obligations.csv)

obligation.description: Short normalized obligation label, if extracted

period_hours.description: Frequency/period normalized to hours, for numeric comparison in L4/L7. A2 addition -- not in the original architecture doc but needed for deterministic conflict/decay checks.

topic.description: Topic bucket used by L3's same-topic-bucket rule

revision_status.description: A2 addition: coarse status parsed from the raw revision field, used by L7 DECAY.
